title: lolium × fleischeri
intro: Lolium × fleischeri, also known as ryegrass hybrid or ryegrass x, is a type of hybridized grass plant that is a cross between Lolium multiflorum (Italian ryegrass) and Lolium perenne (perennial ryegrass). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been shown to have potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. Lolium × fleischeri has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems, and is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal effects. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential to promote wound healing and reduce the risk of certain diseases.
